title: Input Group
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Input Group helper with Effect Schema addon alignment, grouped controls, text, buttons, input and textarea affordances, and local examples composed from existing shadcn registry controls.
markdown:
# Input Group

## Overview

Input Group is a Foldkit-native port of the shadcn base-nova Input Group helper. It composes inputs, textareas, addons, buttons, labels, keyboard hints, and grouped controls while preserving the origin slot and class contracts.

## Foldkit Model

Input Group is a stateless render helper. It does not own a Model, Message, update function, or Command. Parent views provide children, event attributes, values, and side-effect messages.

## Usage

Import the helper from the generated registry source and compose it inside a Foldkit view after binding the Html factory.

```ts
InputGroup<Message>({
  children: [
    InputGroupInput<Message>({
      placeholder: 'Search...',
    }),
    InputGroupAddon<Message>({
      align: 'inline-end',
      children: [InputGroupText<Message>({ children: ['12 results'] })],
    }),
  ],
})
```

Use `align: 'block-start'` or `align: 'block-end'` for header and footer affordances. Use `dir: 'rtl'` on the group and addons when rendering right-to-left controls.

## Examples

The registry includes live examples for basic states, inline and block addons, buttons, Button Group composition, dropdown triggers, icons, keyboard hints, labels, spinner addons, text addons, textareas, card composition, and RTL layout.

Toast and clipboard examples are represented as static controls because those effects belong in parent Foldkit messages and commands.

## Accessibility

Input Group renders a `role="group"` root. Labels should still target the actual input or textarea id. Icon-only buttons should provide `ariaLabel`, and grouped controls should keep their individual accessible names.

## Foldkit Differences

The origin shadcn implementation composes React, CVA, icon packages, clipboard hooks, sonner toasts, and `react-textarea-autosize`. This registry item replaces those pieces with Foldkit Html, Effect Schema literals, local class helpers, local registry dependencies, inline SVG examples, and static textarea sizing.

Those differences are accepted because installable source must stay Foldkit-native while preserving the origin visual structure and composition behavior.

registry.reason: Input Group buttons compose local shadcn Button controls.
Input Group examples compose the local Button Group item.
Card examples compose the local Card item.
Dropdown-oriented examples compose local Dropdown Menu trigger attributes without importing upstream React.
Form examples compose local Field affordances.
Input Group Input composes the local shadcn Input control.
Keyboard shortcut examples compose the local Kbd item.
Label examples compose the local Label item.
Spinner-specific Input Group examples compose the local shadcn Spinner item.
Input Group Textarea composes the local shadcn Textarea control.
Input Group replaces CVA with local class canonicalization helpers.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native helper and examples.
Provides Effect Schema literals for addon alignment and button size options.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.

development.reason: Origin CVA usage is replaced by Effect Schema literals and pure local class maps.
Origin icon package usage is replaced by local inline SVGs.
Origin icon package usage is replaced by local inline SVGs.
Origin RTL language selector usage is replaced by deterministic local RTL labels.
Clipboard behavior belongs in parent Foldkit messages and commands, not this stateless render helper.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.
Autosize behavior is not required for the core helper and is replaced by static textarea sizing in examples.
Toast behavior waits for the local toast or sonner foundation instead of importing the upstream runtime.

deviations.summary: CVA is replaced by Effect Schema addon alignment and button size options plus explicit Foldkit attribute helpers.
deviations.rationale: Installable Foldkit source must stay Effect-native and must not import React or CVA.

deviations.summary: Icon examples and RTL labels use local inline SVGs and deterministic strings instead of origin icon packages and language selector runtime.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on lucide-react, @tabler/icons-react, or the origin app language selector.

deviations.summary: Toast and copy-to-clipboard behavior is represented as static controls until local command/toast foundations are available.
deviations.rationale: Side effects belong in parent Foldkit messages and commands; this stateless helper must not import sonner or React clipboard hooks.

deviations.summary: Textarea examples use static Foldkit textarea sizing instead of react-textarea-autosize.
deviations.rationale: Autosize behavior is not required for the installable Input Group contract and would need a separate local behavior foundation.
